nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: {{playerName}}! Glad you could make it. Come on in — the view from the penthouse is incredible. Let me introduce you to some people who've been dying to meet you.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: Lead the way. I'm always open to meeting new people.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: Sure, but I'm not staying long. Early flight tomorrow.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: Actually, I think I'm going to head out. Long day.

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: This is the guy I was telling you about — one of the sharpest minds in baseball. {{playerName}}, meet a few friends of mine. They run things in this town.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: Pleasure to meet you all. What line of work are you in?

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: Nice to meet you.

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: We've got an opportunity that might interest someone with your profile. Nothing crazy — just some smart money moving to smart people. Can I send you the details next week?

engaged.description: You made powerful new connections. Whether that's good or bad remains to be seen.

left_early.description: You left before things got interesting. Probably for the best.

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: There he is! The man of the hour. Everyone here knows your name, {{playerName}}. Come — there's someone at the bar who wants to talk business.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: Business? At a party? Must be serious. Let's hear it.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: I'm good right here. If they want to talk, they can come to me.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: I'm here for the party, not business. Maybe another time.

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: Look — I don't do small talk. I have a deal that'll make you more money in one year than your last three contracts combined. Interested, or should I find someone else?

hooked.description: The pitch was intriguing. You exchanged numbers.

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: Thanks for coming, {{playerName}}. I know this place looks... discreet. That's the point. What I'm about to show you isn't available to the public.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: I'm listening.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: Why the secrecy? This feels like something I should have my lawyer present for.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: Yeah, this isn't for me. I don't do back rooms.

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: We're building something offshore. Completely legal — just... tax efficient. Your investment doubles in 18 months. I've already got three senators in. You'd be the sports guy.

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: No lawyers needed. This isn't a contract — it's an invitation. The kind of people in this room don't need lawyers. They ARE the lawyers. And the judges.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: What's the minimum buy-in?

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: Let me think about it. I'll call you.

invested.description: You wired the money. The returns started flowing immediately.

delayed.description: You didn't commit. But you didn't say no either.

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: {{playerName}}, I want you to meet someone special. He doesn't usually do this — but he saw what you built in baseball and he respects it. He wants to help you build something bigger.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: I'm flattered. Set it up.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: Bigger than what? I'm doing pretty well.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: I appreciate it, but I've got enough on my plate.

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: He's got an IPO coming. Pre-market access. The kind of thing that turns millionaires into billionaires. All he needs is a public face he can trust. That's you.

took_meeting.description: The meeting happened. The money started moving.

declined.description: You walked away from a lot of money. Or a lot of trouble.

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: Here's the situation, {{playerName}}. We need someone clean — someone the public trusts. You sign a consulting agreement, we wire $5 million to your account. You never have to do anything.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: What's the catch? Nobody pays $5 million for nothing.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: $5 million? Where do I sign?

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: This doesn't feel right. I'm out.

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: The catch is discretion. You don't ask where the money comes from. You don't talk about this meeting. Ever. In return, you get generational wealth. And if you ever want to own a team — I can make that happen.

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: Smart man. The wire goes out tonight. Welcome to the inner circle.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: ...Tell me more about the team.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: I've heard enough. Don't contact me again.

signed.description: You signed. The money appeared overnight. You told yourself it was consulting.

refused.description: You left the table. Your agent was right — something was wrong.

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: Your agent called me. Said you should walk away. I respect that — he's doing his job. But {{playerName}}, what I'm offering you isn't something agents understand. This is legacy money. Dynasty money.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: My agent doesn't make my decisions. I'm listening.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: Maybe he's right. This whole thing has felt off from the start.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: He IS right. Lose my number.

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: I'm putting $5 million in escrow with your name on it. You don't even have to do anything. Just... don't say no. Not yet.

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: Off? Or just unfamiliar? You've never played at this level, {{playerName}}. The rules are different up here. Better. Trust me.

stayed_in.description: Against your better judgment, you stayed in. The money was too real to ignore.

got_out.description: You hung up. Blocked the number. Couldn't sleep for a week.

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: Private jet leaves at midnight. No phones. No cameras. No names. Just the most powerful people you'll ever meet — and more money than you've ever seen. Last chance to back out, {{playerName}}.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: I'm in. Let's go.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: Where exactly are we going?

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: No. I don't care what it costs me. I'm done.

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: Somewhere the rules don't apply. Somewhere you can be whoever you want to be. No judgments. No consequences. That's the whole point.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: ...Fine. But if anything feels wrong, I'm leaving.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: That's exactly what scares me. I'm out. For good.

boarded.description: You boarded the jet. The door closed. No turning back.

walked_away.description: You walked away from the airport. Your hands were shaking. But you were free.

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: {{playerName}}. Before you decide — think about what you've already done. The money, the deals, the meetings. You're already part of this. The only question is whether you get the full benefit... or just the full risk.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: Are you threatening me?

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: I haven't done anything wrong. I invested in some deals. That's it.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: You're right. I'm already in too deep. What's one more step?

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: Threatening? No. I'm protecting you. Come on the trip, and you're protected forever. Stay home, and... well, I can't help you from here.

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: That's what they all say. Until the investigators start pulling threads. The trip isn't just about money, {{playerName}}. It's about making sure everyone stays loyal. Including you.

went.description: You went. You saw things you can never unsee. There's no going back.

refused.description: You refused. Now you wait. And wonder if they'll come for you anyway.
